microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's resilience validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing CI/CD-adjacent workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, engineer-owned model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by reverse-engineering hardware dependency chains and surfacing critical defects before customer impact.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring tight coordination across distributed infrastructure teams.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% — directly increasing engineering team throughput across the platform.
microsoft_2023: Drove adoption of **AI-powered code generation workflows** by running hands-on demos and technical onboarding sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating software delivery cycles.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting **11+ user interviews** with Azure engineering teams to surface intent-based YAML generation as a critical workflow gap, translating real-world friction into a prioritized feature.

Cut developer lookup time by **83%** by migrating documentation to a semantic search platform and enforcing metadata standards — improving how engineering teams navigate and ship against complex infrastructure requirements.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across Azure's cloud infrastructure.

Identified **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch through discovery with 20+ service teams, then built a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and reduce friction in software delivery workflows.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact infrastructure improvements with data-driven precision.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit OS migration by mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and defining a phased transition strategy that kept developer workflows uninterrupted throughout.

Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across the release workflow.

Stabilized the developer intake process by facilitating Agile ceremonies and resolving **40+ high-priority backlog tickets**, reducing planning overhead and unblocking engineering teams from recurring workflow bottlenecks.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM integration, eliminating manual steps and improving conversion throughput.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel performance.
Identified and closed margin leaks by analyzing **1,000+ project records**, delivering a profitability model that gave leadership data-backed pricing guidance across service lines.
